title: 손흥민, EPL 시즌 20골 달성
summary: 토트넘 손흥민이 잉글랜드 프리미어리그 시즌 20골을 달성했습니다.
content: Son Heung-min scored his 20th goal of the Premier League season. The milestone came in a crucial home match against a rival team. Fans erupted in celebration at the stadium. The goal highlighted Son's consistent form throughout the season. His teammates praised his dedication and leadership. Manager expressed confidence in Son's continued excellence. National team coach congratulated him on the achievement. Media coverage has been extensive and positive. Son remains a key player for Tottenham's title challenge. The goal moved Tottenham higher in the league standings. He is now among the top scorers in the league.
